title: ranunculus concordans
intro: Ranunculus concordans, also known as the Foothill Buttercup, is a perennial plant species found in the western United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations and inflammation due to its content of isoorientin and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Ranunculus concordans include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, and is also used in topical creams and salves.
